function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap order (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, and used canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Using context date 2026-03-31 and birthday entries in canonical cast records, the next upcoming birthday date is 04-25; claudia.md confirms the exact name Claudia Reiter. No other birthday entry matched that next date in the cast search results.
